raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "prescribes a behavioral commitment by defining 'service' as sustained self-regulation of emotions and attitudes",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "service consists solely or primarily in internal purity rather than external acts",
    "violent passion, evil affection, rashness, vanity, and discontent are avoidable and incompatible with proper service",
    "discontent toward gods and toward men belongs to the same category of failing",
    "a person can reliably achieve and maintain such purity through intentional conduct"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a negative definition of virtue; each prohibited state is treated as a unified obstacle to the same end",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the recipient accepts the premise that service or moral worth is realized through emotional self-mastery and possesses practical means to monitor and reduce the listed states",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "service actually requires outward duties or relationships that cannot be reduced to inner purity, or the listed affective states sometimes carry accurate information or adaptive value"
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: prescribes a behavioral commitment by defining 'service' as sustained self-regulation of emotions and attitudes
implicit_claims: service consists solely or primarily in internal purity rather than external acts
violent passion, evil affection, rashness, vanity, and discontent are avoidable and incompatible with proper service
discontent toward gods and toward men belongs to the same category of failing
a person can reliably achieve and maintain such purity through intentional conduct
